stories.title: Cluster-lag.log retrospective population (Sprint 17 P1 + historical baseline)
acceptance_criteria: AC1: PM curator invokes scripts/post-squash/cluster-lag-detector.sh retroactively for Sprint 17 P1 cluster (7 PRs: #589, #590, #591, #593, #595, #596, #597)
AC2: cluster-lag.log populated with cluster_lag_detected events for each sub-cluster within 600s windows
AC3: PM generates §Cluster-lag markdown section for docs/sprints/sprint-17/close.md retroactively (if needed) OR docs/sprints/sprint-18/close.md (forward)

AC4: Historical baseline (Sprint 14 P1 base cluster — 7 PRs: #500, #501, #499, #502, #503, #504, #506 per Issue #512) also retroactively populated. Detector will emit cluster_lag_detected for 2-PR sub-clusters (#499+#502, 4m22s gap) and silent_skip for the rest (ADR-0048 lens d — mandatory log emission on no-cluster). Note: 326s lag value in cluster-lag-detector.sh header is d064 TC2 fixture (synthetic), NOT a real historical cluster.
depends_on: STORY-S18-002 (detector must be wired to invoke on historical data)
